source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: Pearson Edexcel International GCSE Physics (4PH1), Issue 4, September 2024, valid from 2017 ongoing. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: All high-impact conclusions map to page-map references. Page references use printed/footer page numbers. Bold/P scope rule and paper split are documented.

topic_tree.notes: 8 topics cover specification content p.11-28. topic_id stable and unique within skill. Scope/out_of_scope present. Physics-only (bold/P) markers acknowledged in SKILL.md and assessment.json generation_constraints.

assessment_model.notes: Paper 1/Paper 2 structure, weightings, durations, marks, AO weightings, command words, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds and generation_constraints all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear. Examples include A-Level vector resolution and quantum energy levels.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.
Bold/P reference markers are not explicitly attached to individual subtopics; only documented at skill level. Independent visual review recommended before active.
Page references use printed page numbers. Machine consumers may need an explicit physical_page_offset field for automation.
